questions.text: What is a class in object-oriented programming?
An object is best described as:
What is the main purpose of encapsulation?
options: To bundle data and methods and control access to them
To remove all methods from a class
To convert code into machine language
questions.correctAnswer: To bundle data and methods and control access to them

questions.text: Which access modifier commonly prevents direct access from outside a class?

options: Reuse properties and methods of another class
questions.correctAnswer: Reuse properties and methods of another class

questions.text: In inheritance, the class that provides features to another class is called the:
Polymorphism lets the same method name:
Method overriding is an example of:

options: Showing essential features while hiding implementation details
questions.correctAnswer: Showing essential features while hiding implementation details
